symptoms.symptom_name: Acute blistering eruption within days of starting a new oral antibiotic
symptoms.onset: within ~48 hours of starting the antibiotic; blisters over ~6 hours this evening

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Onset within days of a culprit drug is the defining feature of a drug-induced bullous eruption.
A new-drug temporal link is also the classic trigger window for SJS/TEN — which is why the severe mimic must be excluded.

symptoms.symptom_name: Small tense clear vesicles in annular 'string of pearls' clusters
symptoms.character: 2-4mm tense vesicles with clear serous fluid, arranged in discrete annular clusters on the extensor forearms

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tense subepidermal vesicles in annular 'string of pearls' clusters are characteristic of linear IgA bullous dermatosis; the tense/annular quality is confirmed on examination, not over chat.
Mucosal involvement is near-universal in SJS/TEN; its absence on history is reassuring, though examination is still required to be definitive.
A negative Nikolsky sign argues against epidermal detachment of SJS/TEN — but it is a bedside manoeuvre that cannot be performed via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: No airway/breathing involvement, no urticaria or angioedema

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anaphylaxis requires airway/breathing/circulatory involvement or mucocutaneous swelling; their absence effectively excludes it.
A febrile prodrome and malaise commonly precede severe cutaneous adverse reactions; being systemically well is reassuring.

symptoms.symptom_name: Localised distribution with no epidermal sloughing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: TEN involves widespread epidermal detachment; a localised eruption with no sheet-like sloughing argues strongly against it.
A localised, non-necrotising bullous eruption fits a mild localised drug-induced LABD.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clear non-purulent serous vesicle fluid, no honey-coloured crusting

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bullous impetigo produces purulent fluid and honey-coloured crusting; clear serous fluid without crusting argues against it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Skin biopsy with direct immunofluorescence showing linear IgA at the basement-membrane zone

investigation_details.expected_result: Linear deposition of IgA along the dermo-epidermal junction
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without biopsy the diagnosis remains presumptive; it is the definitive confirmatory test and cannot be obtained via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Linear IgA at the basement-membrane zone on direct immunofluorescence is the defining diagnostic finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Objective vital signs within normal limits (haemodynamically stable, normal oxygen saturation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal blood pressure, heart rate and oxygen saturation argue against anaphylactic compromise — clinician-measured vitals, not obtainable over chat without a home device.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: drug-induced Linear IgA bullous dermatosis (mild, localised)
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Acute post-drug tense annular vesicles, localised, with no mucosal involvement and no systemic toxicity — the picture of a mild localised drug-induced bullous dermatosis.

The features that, if present, would flip this to an emergency — mucosal erosions, positive Nikolsky, systemic toxicity, epidermal sloughing. Several require in-person examination, which is why urgent face-to-face assessment is mandated.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person dermatological examination (skin survey, mucosal survey, Nikolsky sign)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The examination that excludes SJS/TEN cannot be done over chat; it is the immediate priority and drives disposition.
Confirmatory test for linear IgA bullous dermatosis; arranged via dermatology referral, not obtainable remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empirical broad blood panel or allergy testing ordered remotely
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: No indication for the AI Doctor to order remote bloodwork or allergy panels; the priority is red-flag screening, drug cessation and urgent in-person review.
